---
title: ""
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

```{=html}
<div class="country-hero">
  <h1>🇰🇪 Kenya</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Republic of Kenya — Health Facility Dataset v1.1</p>
</div>

<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">12 700</div><div class="stat-label">Total facilities</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">91 %</div><div class="stat-label">With GPS coordinates</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">47 Counties</div><div class="stat-label">Admin coverage</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">2016–2024</div><div class="stat-label">Temporal coverage</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">v1.1</div><div class="stat-label">Current version</div></div>
</div>
```

## Overview

Kenya operates one of the most comprehensive open health facility registries in sub-Saharan Africa — the **Kenya Master Health Facility List (KMHFL)**. The Portal dataset is derived from KMHFL quarterly extracts, supplemented with DHIS2 codes and coordinate cross-validation across all 47 counties.

---

## Facility Breakdown

```{=html}
<div class="data-section">
  <h3>By Facility Type</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Type</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Dispensary / Pharmacy</td><td>5 850</td><td>46.1 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Health Centre</td><td>2 940</td><td>23.1 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Clinic (Private)</td><td>2 210</td><td>17.4 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>District Hospital</td><td>1 180</td><td>9.3 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>County / National Referral</td><td>520</td><td>4.1 %</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="data-section">
  <h3>By Ownership</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Ownership</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Government (MoH Kenya)</td><td>6 350</td><td>50.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Private for Profit</td><td>3 810</td><td>30.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Faith-Based Organisation</td><td>1 780</td><td>14.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>NGO / Other</td><td>760</td><td>6.0 %</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

---

## Data Quality

```{=html}
<div class="data-section">
  <h3>Quality Scores — v1.1</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Dimension</th><th>Score</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Coordinate validity</td><td>91 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Attribute completeness</td><td>84 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Duplicate rate (post-dedup)</td><td>&lt; 0.3 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Admin code consistency</td><td>97 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Temporal coverage</td><td>2016–2024</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

---

## Available Fields

```{=html}
<p>
  <span class="data-tag">facility_id</span><span class="data-tag">source_id (KMHFL)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">name</span><span class="data-tag">facility_type</span>
  <span class="data-tag">ownership</span><span class="data-tag">admin1 (County)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">admin2 (Sub-County)</span><span class="data-tag">admin3 (Ward)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">longitude</span><span class="data-tag">latitude</span>
  <span class="data-tag">coord_source</span><span class="data-tag">keph_level</span>
  <span class="data-tag">operational</span><span class="data-tag">year</span><span class="data-tag">version</span>
</p>
```

---

## Download

::: {.callout-note}
Data are released under **CC BY 4.0**. Please cite the Zenodo record in publications.
:::

| Format | Link |
|---|---|
| CSV (all facilities) | *Coming soon* |
| GeoPackage (.gpkg) | *Coming soon* |
| R package `{hfportal}` | *Coming soon* |
| Quality report PDF | *Coming soon* |

**Zenodo DOI:** `10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXX`

---

## Code Example

```r
library(hfportal)

ken <- get_facilities(country = "KEN", version = "1.1")

library(dplyr)
ken |>
  count(admin1, facility_type) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(admin1, n), y = n, fill = facility_type)) +
  geom_col() + coord_flip() + theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Kenya: Facilities by County & Type", x = NULL)
```

*Dataset last updated: August 2024 | Source: KMHFL (Kenya MoH)*

```{=html}
<a href="../index.html" class="btn-hf-primary" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block;">← All Countries</a>
```
